title: Redshift-independent cosmology with gravitational-wave luminosity distances and fast radio burst dispersion measures
bridge_note: GW luminosity distance ⊕ FRB dispersion measure → degeneracy reduction. Two independent observables improve identifiability (geometry ⊕ matter → signal > noise at 45° 📐).
cosine_bridge: Two independent signals align (geometry ⊕ matter) → constraint tightens → signal > noise (cosθ ≥ 1/√(1²+1²)).
